title: SPF Hearing: Update on Navy Programs and Capabilities for Seapower and Projection Forces
description:
Purpose:
To receive testimony from the Acting Assistant Secretary of the Navy for Research, Development and Acquisition, the Deputy Chief of Naval Operations for Warfighting Requirements and Capabilities, and the Deputy Commandant of the Marine Corps for Combat Development and Integration about the Navy’s budget request for FY2026.
text:
Purpose: To receive testimony from the Acting Assistant Secretary of the Navy for Research, Development and Acquisition, the Deputy Chief of Naval Operations for Warfighting Requirements and Capabilities, and the Deputy Commandant of the Marine Corps for Combat Development and Integration about the Navy’s budget request for FY2026.
Rep. Kelly Opening Statement
Witnesses:
Dr. Brett A. Seidle
Acting Assistant Secretary of the Navy for Research, Development, and Acquisition
Department of the Navy
Vice Admiral James E. Pitts
Deputy Chief of Naval Operations for Warfighting Requirements and Capabilities
United States Navy
Lieutenant General Eric E. Austin
Deputy Commandant of the Marine Corps for Combat Development and Integration
United States Marine Corps
